title: stage5 low-activity audit result report - windowed_v2 decoded 60vs72
executive_status: Human audit completed 4/4; comparable records=3/4; overall-pick aggregate among comparable records is offline_mvp_nores_vocoder_dataset_loop.step60=1, offline_mvp_nores_vocoder_dataset_loop.step72=1, 打平=1; Human overall-pick remains split across the two governance axes; keep governance mode at tradeoff rather than collapsing to a single winner.

cross_axis_readout.label: split_across_axes
cross_axis_readout.note: Human overall-pick remains split across the two governance axes; keep governance mode at tradeoff rather than collapsing to a single winner.

comparable_record_notes.notes: 本条结尾出现step72的典型毛刺。step60也有该情况，但毛刺间隔更短（类似“帧率更高”），导致听起来更平滑。
本条两者无明显区分。但这条的清音段（吸气/叹气）两者都出现毛刺。我有一个猜测：原音频对应段在能量上确实出现这种毛刺，而不是模型自己加进去。

noncomparable_record_notes.notes: 本条原音频出现频繁辅音/爆破音导致能量突变明显，无法在更细粒度上对比“毛刺”是否出现，但整体上两者质量无明显区别。

governance_snapshot.executive_status: Current low-activity governance mode is tradeoff; fragmentation axis favors offline_mvp_nores_vocoder_dataset_loop.step60; leakage-strength axis favors offline_mvp_nores_vocoder_dataset_loop.step72; soft rerank currently selects step 72.

fragmentation_axis.note: Use this axis when burst/toggle risk and local structural safety are the primary question.

leakage_strength_axis.note: Use this axis when comparing residual leakage strength inside a leakage cluster or choosing a fallback after fragmentation has already tied.

governance_snapshot.cross_axis_note: Cross-axis note: fragmentation axis and leakage-strength axis point to different branch/groups; treat this as a dual-axis tradeoff instead of forcing a single winner.

notes: This fixed-format report joins human audio-audit output with the fixed governance report instead of requiring a separate narrative-only interpretation memo.
Cross-axis readout is derived from comparable-record overall_pick results; tie counts are preserved instead of being forced into one branch.
Use the governance snapshot to keep fragmentation-axis and leakage-strength-axis wording aligned with the quantitative report.
